goal: Add a side-effect-free runtime dispatch integration contract model that classifies whether a BPK-007 dispatch/frontend readiness projection is eligible for dry-run-only runtime adoption, operator-reviewed adoption, or blocked. Do not add runtime routes, orchestrator calls, provider calls, database writes, GitHub writes, package changes, or frontend files.
scope_out: Do not add an executable runtime route or worker dispatch.
Do not call providers, GitHub, database, maya-core, or external services.
Do not add package scripts, dependencies, environment variables, deployment notes, or frontend files.
Do not change BPK-007 readiness semantics.
claims: Runtime adoption can be classified from the BPK-007 readiness projection without executing dispatch.
Dry-run adoption and write-capable adoption are separate statuses.
Write-capable runtime adoption requires an explicit authority reference.
Blocked or review-only readiness cannot become runtime dispatch allowed.
assumptions: BPK-007 is committed and available as the readiness projection source.
This block prepares the runtime boundary contract only; executable integration belongs to a later block.
Authority references are opaque evidence strings, not live permit checks.
dod: builder/src/runtimeDispatchIntegrationContract.ts exports side-effect-free runtime adoption types and classifier.
The classifier distinguishes runtime_candidate, operator_review, and blocked.
The classifier separates dry-run eligibility from write-capable dispatch allowance.
builder/tests/runtimeDispatchIntegrationContract.test.ts covers dry-run candidate, write candidate, missing authority review, blocked readiness, review readiness, and missing evidence.
review-packets/BPK-008.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused runtime integration contract test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: A provider, GitHub, database, maya-core, deployment, or frontend change becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-007 produced a pure dispatch/frontend readiness projection. BPK-008 should classify runtime adoption eligibility without opening runtime dispatch.
